# Committee

House, Senate, and Joint committees and subcommittees. Subcommittees have parent_thomas_id set.

**GraphQL type:** `Committee` · **Connection:** `CommitteesConnection`

## Queries

| Query | Returns | Description |
|-------|---------|-------------|
| `allCommittees(filter, orderBy, first, last, before, after)` | `CommitteesConnection` | Paginated list with filtering and ordering |
| `committeeByThomasId(thomasId: String!)` | `Committee` | Look up by primary key |

## Fields

| Field | GraphQL Type | Notes |
|-------|-------------|-------|
| `thomasId` | `String` | For subcommittees, this is the concatenated parent + subcommittee code (e.g. SSEG03). <span style={{background:'#1877f2',color:'#fff',borderRadius:'3px',padding:'1px 5px',fontSize:'0.7rem',fontWeight:600,whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}>PK</span> |
| `chamber` | `String` |  <span style={{background:'#dc3545',color:'#fff',borderRadius:'3px',padding:'1px 5px',fontSize:'0.7rem',fontWeight:600,whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}>required</span>. One of: `house`, `senate`, `joint` |
| `name` | `String` |  <span style={{background:'#dc3545',color:'#fff',borderRadius:'3px',padding:'1px 5px',fontSize:'0.7rem',fontWeight:600,whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}>required</span> |
| `jurisdiction` | `String` |  |
| `parentThomasId` | `String` |  <span style={{background:'#198754',color:'#fff',borderRadius:'3px',padding:'1px 5px',fontSize:'0.7rem',fontWeight:600,whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}>FK</span> |
| `subcommitteeId` | `String` |  |
| `isCurrent` | `Boolean` |  |
| `createdAt` | `Datetime` |  |
| `updatedAt` | `Datetime` |  |

## Relationships

### Belongs to

| Field | Returns | Via |
|-------|---------|-----|
| `committeeByParentThomasId` | `Committee` *(nullable)* | `parentThomasId` |

### Has many

| Field | Returns | Via |
|-------|---------|-----|
| `committeesByParentThomasId` | `CommitteesConnection` | `parentThomasId` |
| `billCommitteesByThomasId` | `BillCommitteesConnection` | `thomasId` |
| `committeeMembershipsByThomasId` | `CommitteeMembershipsConnection` | `thomasId` |

## Example

```graphql
{
  allCommittees(
    filter: {
      chamber: { equalTo: "senate" }
      isCurrent: { equalTo: true }
      parentThomasId: { isNull: true }
    }
    orderBy: NAME_ASC
  ) {
    nodes {
      thomasId
      name
      jurisdiction
    }
  }
}
```
